prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This regulatory judgement pertains to Look Ahead Care and Support Limited, which operates across 21 local authority areas in London and the South East of England. Therefore, it directly applies to England, as the information and assessments relate to the governance and financial viability of a provider of social housing in that region.
